answer:
\boxed{I}  

Explanation: Magic memory’s Read operation returns the count of Reads since last Clear, which can emulate a Test-and-Set by checking if the returned value is 0 (first read after clear) or not, so I is true. It can coordinate processes via mutual exclusion on a shared-memory multiprocessor, making II true. However, it is also useful on a uniprocessor for synchronization, so III is false. Thus, only I and II are correct.
